flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Geneva College rose 16% between 2006 and 2009 ($18.5k → $21.4k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Geneva College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($30.0k → $33.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Geneva College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3% → 0.0%).
